requirementRef: Requirement: Question.ask honors stream AbortSignal — Scenario: stream aborts while question pending
description: pending question is auto-rejected when its bound AbortSignal fires
notes: core fix target — Requirement A primary scenario

requirementRef: Requirement: Question.ask honors stream AbortSignal — Scenario: manual reply still wins against late abort
description: reply resolves first; abort arrives after and is a no-op
notes: abort handler must idempotently skip when pending[id] is absent

requirementRef: Requirement: Question.ask honors stream AbortSignal — Scenario: signal already aborted at ask time
description: pre-aborted signal short-circuits without publishing question.asked
notes: prevents ghost dialog flash on pre-aborted stream

requirementRef: Requirement: QuestionDock cache key survives AI re-ask — Scenario: AI re-asks identical question after abort
description: identical questions on same session hit cache even with different request.id
notes: Requirement B primary — content-hash cache key enables re-ask restore

requirementRef: Requirement: QuestionDock cache key survives AI re-ask — Scenario: different question does not leak into cache
description: a different question content does not get previous input auto-filled
notes: ensures hash collision boundary is enforced

requirementRef: Requirement: QuestionDock cache key survives AI re-ask — Scenario: cache is per-session
description: same questions on different sessionID do not cross-contaminate

requirementRef: Requirement: prompt-runtime cancel carries reason — Scenario: manual user stop
Requirement: prompt-runtime cancel carries reason — Scenario: rate-limit fallback rotation
description: processor rotation abort carries rate-limit-fallback reason down to Question abort handler
notes: end-to-end: abort reason flows from processor → controller → Question handler

requirementRef: Requirement: prompt-runtime cancel carries reason — Scenario: reason enum boundary
description: TypeScript blocks free-form reason strings at compile time
